title: DiffGI: Differentiable Geometry Images for High-Fidelity Thin-Shell 3D Generation
innovation_summary: DiffGI: Differentiable Geometry Images for High-Fidelity Thin-Shell 3D Generation: To address this, we propose Differentiable Geometry Image (DiffGI), an end-to-end 3D-to-2D mapping framework that seamlessly integrates surface representation and geometric optimization.
